router.notes: Redeployed with maxAutomaticTokenAssociations=-1 (HIP-904). Original deploy at 0.0.10464662 had max_auto=0 — HTS transferFrom into router silently failed, blocking every Buy PT / Buy YT / addLiquidity flow. New router is operator-admin-keyed so we can tune auto-assoc if HTS semantics shift; transfer admin to Timelock post-handoff alongside the other contracts.

abandoned_router_v1.reason: max_automatic_token_associations was 0; admin key was the contract itself (immutable). Replaced by 0.0.10475923 with -1 auto-assoc and operator admin.

fission_zap.notes: One-tx HBAR→SY mint zap. Permissionless, no admin. maxAutomaticTokenAssociations=-1 set at deploy.

abandoned_zap_v1.reason: first deploy had wrapAmount-in-wei but Hedera msg.value is in tinybars — InsufficientValue revert. Replaced by 0.0.10475908 with msg.value-driven design.

notes: Ed25519-fixed redeploy on 2026-05-22 IST. New factory 0.0.10488654 (0x...a00b4e), new deployers 0.0.10488646 (0x...a00b46) + 0.0.10488651 (0x...a00b4b). SY adapter REUSED — V3 NFT #74444 with $700+ USDC/WHBAR liquidity untouched. Operator's positions on old market 0xfa90...8a6d remain withdrawable. Pending: proposeSY + confirmSY + createRewardsMarket + initialize + frontend env update.

markets.seed_size_hbar_equiv: 30 HBAR zap → ~22M raw SY + 22M raw PT (≈ $1.50/side)
markets.notes: Ed25519-fixed market. Pairs with existing SY adapter (V3 NFT #74444, USDC/WHBAR full-range). Seed is intentionally small — top up with more HBAR via FissionZap if needed before launch.

abandoned.reason: Iteratively redeployed while debugging Hedera-specific bugs: (1) HtsHelpers.createFungible drained msg.value into first call when called 3× in setTokens; (2) FissionFactory missed setMaxAutomaticTokenAssociations; (3) SY/Market contracts couldn't receive HTS tokens without explicit associate calls; (4) SaucerSwap V2 NPM requires msg.value (USD-cents-denominated fee converted via tinycentsToTinybars) for V3 NFT mint; (5) _burnYt didn't unfreeze before wipe (frozen YT holders couldn't merge); (6) _mintLp(0xdEaD, MIN_LIQUIDITY) failed because 0xdEaD isn't HTS-associated. All fixed in source; current factory + market are the working set.
abandoned.reason_2026_05_22: Ed25519 reward-accrual bug fix — see audits/internal/SECURITY_REVIEW_ED25519_BAL_2026-05-22.md. Old contracts remain live; existing positions on the old market are fully withdrawable on-chain. Fixed redeploy: factory 0x...a00b4e, deployers 0x...a00b46 + 0x...a00b4b.

router_v3.notes: ActionRouter v3 — fixes addLiquidityProportional typing bug from v2 (now pulls sy.shareToken() instead of the SY contract address). maxAutomaticTokenAssociations=-1, operator-admin. Drop-in ABI-compatible with v2 (0.0.10475923) for the other entries.

mega_zap.notes: Atomic HBAR → PT/YT/LP zap. Wraps FissionZap (HBAR→SY) and ActionRouterV3 (SY→PT/YT/LP). Permissionless, no admin. maxAutomaticTokenAssociations=-1.
